name: DeepSeek-Prover-V2
tagline: Lean 4 theorem prover in 7B and 671B sizes; RL for subgoal decomposition, state-of-the-art on formal-proof benchmarks.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-Prover-V2 (DeepSeek), released 2025-04-30 — part of the DeepSeek Prover line. Lean 4 theorem prover in 7B and 671B sizes; RL for subgoal decomposition…
overview: DeepSeek-Prover-V2 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek Prover line. Released 2025-04-30. Formal theorem-proving line for the Lean proof assistant, using RL with subgoal decomposition.
What's notable in this version: Lean 4 theorem prover in 7B and 671B sizes; RL for subgoal decomposition, state-of-the-art on formal-proof benchmarks. Open weights.
